case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. REUSCH, AUGUSTINA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO SERVED AUG-03-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REUSCH, AUGUSTINA
